title: On Holding (NYSE:ONON) - Earnings & Revenue Performance
text: On Holding's historical earnings and revenue performance shows consistent acceleration and strong profitability growth. From IPO in 2021 through 2024, the company demonstrated accelerating revenue growth from 67.9% in Q1 2022 to sustained high growth rates above 27% in recent quarters. Gross margin has expanded from 51.8% in Q1 2022 to nearly 60% in 2024, reflecting operational improvements and product mix. Net income margins have improved significantly, with the company moving from low single-digit margins in early periods to more robust profitability. The company has maintained consistent execution across economic cycles and competitive pressures. Future growth is expected to moderate from historical rates but remain healthy as the company matures.
